_comment: Canonical label set for PawTalk's AI bark classifier. This file is the single source of truth for label names and their integer indices. Both prepare_dataset.py and the inference module read from this. Do not reorder entries — the integer index is baked into saved checkpoints.

descriptions.excited: High energy, rapid bursts — greeting bark, pre-walk anticipation
descriptions.playful: Moderate energy, bouncy rhythm — fetch, tug-of-war, play invitation
descriptions.alert: Sharp bursts with silences — stranger, unexpected noise, territorial
descriptions.anxious: Irregular pattern, many pauses, variable energy — separation, fear, stress
descriptions.warning: Sustained loud energy, low-pitched, deliberate — intruder, threat boundary
